metadata.title: Kajuru Local Government
metadata.description: Official website of Kajuru Local Government Area, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

slides.title: Kajuru – A Land of Natural Beauty
slides.subtitle: Kajuru Local Government Area is known for its rich culture, agricultural strength, and scenic landscapes in southern Kaduna.

slides.title: Kajuru – Home of Culture and Heritage
slides.subtitle: Kajuru is home to diverse communities and historic landmarks including the famous Kajuru Castle.

paragraphs: Kajuru Local Government Area is located in the southern part of Kaduna State, Nigeria. The administrative headquarters is Kajuru town.
The LGA is home to several ethnic communities including the Adara (Kadara) people, Hausa, Fulani, and Gbagyi, contributing to the cultural diversity of the region.
Agriculture remains the primary economic activity, with crops such as maize, ginger, millet, sorghum, and groundnuts cultivated across communities.

chairman.name: Executive Chairman, Kajuru Local Government
messageParagraphs: Welcome to the official website of Kajuru Local Government Area. Our administration is committed to improving infrastructure, education, healthcare, and economic opportunities for our citizens.
Kajuru is blessed with fertile land, hardworking farmers, and vibrant communities that contribute significantly to Kaduna State's agricultural sector.
Through responsible governance and community engagement, we aim to build a prosperous future for all residents of Kajuru.

cards.title: Maize Farming
cards.subtitle: Staple Crop
cards.description: Maize is widely cultivated across Kajuru communities and remains one of the most important staple crops.

cards.title: Ginger Farming
cards.subtitle: Major Cash Crop
cards.description: Kajuru farmers contribute to Kaduna State's strong ginger production, supplying markets locally and nationally.

cards.title: Livestock Rearing
cards.subtitle: Animal Husbandry
cards.description: Livestock such as cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry are raised across rural communities within Kajuru LGA.

news.subtitle: Stay informed about development projects, community programs, and government initiatives in Kajuru.

footer.headquarters: Headquarters: Local Government Secretariat, Kajuru, Kaduna State, Nigeria.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Kajuru Local Government Area. All rights reserved.

hero.title: About Kajuru
hero.subtitle: Discover the culture, geography, and economy of Kajuru Local Government Area.

location: Neighboring LGAs: Chikun, Kachia, Kauru, and parts of Niger State.
demographics: Major Ethnic Groups: Adara (Kadara), Hausa, Fulani, Gbagyi.
Languages Spoken: Adara language, Hausa, and English.
economy: Main Economic Activities: Farming, livestock rearing, and trading.
Climate: Tropical savannah climate suitable for agriculture.

geographyEconomy.title: Geography & Economy
geographyEconomy.location: Kajuru lies within the southern Kaduna region and has fertile land suitable for grain and cash crop production.
geographyEconomy.climate: The area experiences a rainy season between May and October and a dry season between November and April.
mainActivities: Crop Farming: Maize, millet, sorghum, ginger, and groundnuts.
Livestock Rearing: Cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry.
Tourism: Visitors are attracted to Kajuru Castle and the scenic landscapes.

hero.title: Government
hero.subtitle: Leadership and administrative structure of Kajuru Local Government.

structure.intro: Kajuru Local Government operates through an executive leadership supported by a legislative council and administrative departments.
executive: Supervisory Councilors responsible for major sectors.
legislative: The Legislative Council consists of elected councilors representing wards in Kajuru.
A Speaker elected among the councilors presides over legislative sessions.

hero.title: Development Projects
hero.subtitle: Infrastructure and community development initiatives across Kajuru Local Government Area.

projectsPage.introParagraph: Kajuru Local Government continues to invest in roads, healthcare, education, and agricultural development to improve the lives of its residents.

hero.title: Agriculture in Kajuru
hero.subtitle: Agriculture remains the backbone of Kajuru's economy.

agriculturePage.overview: Farmers across Kajuru cultivate maize, ginger, millet, sorghum, and groundnuts while raising livestock to support household income and food supply.

majorCrops.title: Maize
majorCrops.description: A staple crop cultivated widely across Kajuru communities.

majorCrops.title: Ginger
majorCrops.description: A major cash crop supporting local farmers and markets.

majorCrops.title: Livestock Rearing
majorCrops.description: Cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry are raised across Kajuru communities.
